title: Procurement pipeline shows zero enterprise deals in contract review
anchor: No enterprise opportunities currently sit in procurement review with signoff or contract revisions.
connect: Enterprise segment win rate holds at 0% for both Q2 and trailing four quarters.
body: No enterprise opportunities currently sit in procurement review with signoff or contract revisions. Enterprise segment win rate holds at 0% for both Q2 and trailing four quarters.
trace: Complete absence of enterprise deals in late-stage procurement aligns with zero win rate pattern.

title: Marketing-sourced pipeline attribution runs at 0% of Q2 creation
anchor: Zero dollars of the $13.2M in new pipeline carries marketing attribution tags.
connect: Outbound-sourced enterprise deals show 0% win rate with no closed opportunities.
body: Zero dollars of the $13.2M in new pipeline carries marketing attribution tags. Outbound-sourced enterprise deals show 0% win rate with no closed opportunities.
trace: Complete absence of marketing attribution suggests either tracking issues or pure outbound model.

title: Mid-market proposal stage timing shows no baseline from recent closes
anchor: Q2 closed mid-market deals provide no proposal-stage duration data with zero completed cycles.
connect: Trailing four quarters mid-market proposal timing also shows no measurable baseline.
body: Q2 closed mid-market deals provide no proposal-stage duration data with zero completed cycles. Trailing four quarters mid-market proposal timing also shows no measurable baseline.
trace: Absence of mid-market deal closures prevents cycle time analysis across multiple quarters.

title: Competitive position versus Beacon Systems shows no head-to-head deals

connect: Q1 2026 versus Beacon also shows 0-0 record across the quarter.
